option.name: originalContent
option.value:
FROM php:8.2-apache
# Enable Apache modules RUN a2enmod rewrite headers
# Install PHP extensions RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \ libpng-dev \ libjpeg-dev \ libwebp-dev \ && docker-php-ext-configure gd --with-jpeg --with-webp \ && docker-php-ext-install gd pdo pdo_mysql \ && apt-get clean && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
# PHP upload limits — must be set before any request COPY php.ini /usr/local/etc/php/conf.d/uploads.ini
# Set document root to public/ RUN sed -i 's|DocumentRoot /var/www/html|DocumentRoot /var/www/html/public|g' /etc/apache2/sites-available/000-default.conf
# Allow .htaccess in the public/ directory RUN echo '<Directory /var/www/html/public>\n Options Indexes FollowSymLinks\n AllowOverride All\n Require all granted\n</Directory>' >> /etc/apache2/apache2.conf
# Copy application files COPY . /var/www/html/
# Create and secure uploads directory RUN mkdir -p /var/www/html/public/uploads \ && chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/html \ && find /var/www/html -type d -exec chmod 755 {} \; \ && find /var/www/html -type f -exec chmod 644 {} \; \ && chmod -R 775 /var/www/html/public/uploads
EXPOSE 80

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
FROM php:8.2-apache
# Enable Apache modules RUN a2enmod rewrite headers
# Install PHP extensions RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \ libpng-dev \ libjpeg-dev \ libwebp-dev \ && docker-php-ext-configure gd --with-jpeg --with-webp \ && docker-php-ext-install gd pdo pdo_mysql \ && apt-get clean && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
# PHP upload limits — must be set before any request COPY ./backoffice/php.ini /usr/local/etc/php/conf.d/uploads.ini
# Set document root to public/ RUN sed -i 's|DocumentRoot /var/www/html|DocumentRoot /var/www/html/public|g' /etc/apache2/sites-available/000-default.conf
# Allow .htaccess in the public/ directory RUN echo '<Directory /var/www/html/public>\n Options Indexes FollowSymLinks\n AllowOverride All\n Require all granted\n</Directory>' >> /etc/apache2/apache2.conf
# Copy application files COPY ./backoffice /var/www/html/ COPY ./images /var/www/html/public/uploads/
# Create and secure uploads directory RUN mkdir -p /var/www/html/public/uploads \ && chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/html \ && find /var/www/html -type d -exec chmod 755 {} \; \ && find /var/www/html -type f -exec chmod 644 {} \; \ && chmod -R 775 /var/www/html/public/uploads
EXPOSE 80

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
version: '3.8'
services: db: image: mysql:8.0 container_name: iran_news_db restart: unless-stopped environment: MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: rootpassword MYSQL_DATABASE: newsdb MYSQL_USER: newsuser MYSQL_PASSWORD: newspass volumes: - db_data:/var/lib/mysql - ./db/init.sql:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/init.sql:ro networks: - news_network healthcheck: test: ["CMD", "mysqladmin", "ping", "-h", "localhost", "-u", "newsuser", "-pnewspass"] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 5
frontoffice: build: context: ./frontoffice dockerfile: Dockerfile container_name: iran_news_front restart: unless-stopped ports: - "8080:80" depends_on: db: condition: service_healthy environment: DB_HOST: db DB_NAME: newsdb DB_USER: newsuser DB_PASS: newspass SITE_URL: http://localhost:8080 command: > sh -c "mkdir -p /var/www/html/public/uploads && chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/html/public/uploads && chmod -R 775 /var/www/html/public/uploads && apache2-foreground" volumes: - uploads_data:/var/www/html/public/uploads networks: - news_network
backoffice: build: context: ./backoffice dockerfile: Dockerfile container_name: iran_news_back restart: unless-stopped ports: - "8081:80" depends_on: db: condition: service_healthy environment: DB_HOST: db DB_NAME: newsdb DB_USER: newsuser DB_PASS: newspass SITE_URL: http://localhost:8081 FRONT_URL: http://localhost:8080 ADMIN_USER: admin ADMIN_PASS: admin123 command: > sh -c "mkdir -p /var/www/html/public/uploads && chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/html/public/uploads && chmod -R 775 /var/www/html/public/uploads && apache2-foreground" volumes: - uploads_data:/var/www/html/public/uploads networks: - news_network
networks: news_network: driver: bridge
volumes: db_data: uploads_data:

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
version: '3.8'
services: db: image: mysql:8.0 container_name: iran_news_db restart: unless-stopped environment: MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: rootpassword MYSQL_DATABASE: newsdb MYSQL_USER: newsuser MYSQL_PASSWORD: newspass volumes: - db_data:/var/lib/mysql - ./db/init.sql:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/init.sql:ro networks: - news_network healthcheck: test: ["CMD", "mysqladmin", "ping", "-h", "localhost", "-u", "newsuser", "-pnewspass"] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 5
frontoffice: build: context: . dockerfile: ./frontoffice/Dockerfile container_name: iran_news_front restart: unless-stopped ports: - "8080:80" depends_on: db: condition: service_healthy environment: DB_HOST: db DB_NAME: newsdb DB_USER: newsuser DB_PASS: newspass SITE_URL: http://localhost:8080 command: > sh -c "mkdir -p /var/www/html/public/uploads && chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/html/public/uploads && chmod -R 775 /var/www/html/public/uploads && apache2-foreground" volumes: - uploads_data:/var/www/html/public/uploads networks: - news_network
backoffice: build: context: . dockerfile: ./backoffice/Dockerfile container_name: iran_news_back restart: unless-stopped ports: - "8081:80" depends_on: db: condition: service_healthy environment: DB_HOST: db DB_NAME: newsdb DB_USER: newsuser DB_PASS: newspass SITE_URL: http://localhost:8081 FRONT_URL: http://localhost:8080 ADMIN_USER: admin ADMIN_PASS: admin123 command: > sh -c "mkdir -p /var/www/html/public/uploads && chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/html/public/uploads && chmod -R 775 /var/www/html/public/uploads && apache2-foreground" volumes: - uploads_data:/var/www/html/public/uploads networks: - news_network
networks: news_network: driver: bridge
volumes: db_data: uploads_data:

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
FROM php:8.2-apache
# Enable Apache modules RUN a2enmod rewrite headers
# Install PHP extensions RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \ libpng-dev \ libjpeg-dev \ libwebp-dev \ && docker-php-ext-configure gd --with-jpeg --with-webp \ && docker-php-ext-install gd pdo pdo_mysql \ && apt-get clean && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
# Set document root to /var/www/html (we copy public/ contents there) # Enable .htaccess in document root RUN sed -i 's|<Directory /var/www/html/>|<Directory /var/www/>|g' /etc/apache2/apache2.conf || true
# Configure default site document root RUN sed -i 's|DocumentRoot /var/www/html|DocumentRoot /var/www/html/public|g' /etc/apache2/sites-available/000-default.conf
# Allow .htaccess overrides for the public directory RUN echo '<Directory /var/www/html/public>\n Options Indexes FollowSymLinks\n AllowOverride All\n Require all granted\n</Directory>' >> /etc/apache2/apache2.conf
# Copy all application files COPY . /var/www/html/
# Set permissions RUN chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/html \ && find /var/www/html -type d -exec chmod 755 {} \; \ && find /var/www/html -type f -exec chmod 644 {} \;
EXPOSE 80

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
FROM php:8.2-apache
# Enable Apache modules RUN a2enmod rewrite headers
# Install PHP extensions RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \ libpng-dev \ libjpeg-dev \ libwebp-dev \ && docker-php-ext-configure gd --with-jpeg --with-webp \ && docker-php-ext-install gd pdo pdo_mysql \ && apt-get clean && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
# Set document root to /var/www/html (we copy public/ contents there) # Enable .htaccess in document root RUN sed -i 's|<Directory /var/www/html/>|<Directory /var/www/>|g' /etc/apache2/apache2.conf || true
# Configure default site document root RUN sed -i 's|DocumentRoot /var/www/html|DocumentRoot /var/www/html/public|g' /etc/apache2/sites-available/000-default.conf
# Allow .htaccess overrides for the public directory RUN echo '<Directory /var/www/html/public>\n Options Indexes FollowSymLinks\n AllowOverride All\n Require all granted\n</Directory>' >> /etc/apache2/apache2.conf
# Copy all application files COPY ./frontoffice /var/www/html/ COPY ./images /var/www/html/public/uploads/
# Set permissions RUN chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/html \ && find /var/www/html -type d -exec chmod 755 {} \; \ && find /var/www/html -type f -exec chmod 644 {} \;
EXPOSE 80
